name: Elloree Storage Cabinet Navy - Threshold™: Home Office Organizer with Divided Interior, Pine Frame
description:
Add versatile storage to your space with this Elloree Storage Cabinet from Threshold™. Designed in a navy hue with sleek black handles, this decorative storage cabinet creates a sophisticated look in your home office or living room space. The spacious tabletop provides you a dedicated area for decorative display, while the two doors on front conceal the storage space to keep the clutter out of sight. Perfect to store everything from extra blankets and throws to safekeeping your favorite reads, this storage cabinet brings function and style to any space.

Overall Width: 30 inches
Overall Height: 32 inches
Overall Depth: 14 inches
Distance from floor to bottom size of X-bar: 3.94 inches
Distance from top side of X-bar to bottom panel: 3.15 inches
Depth of cabinet shelf: 11.38 inches
Width of cabinet shelf: 24.4 inches
Depth of bottom shelf: 12.95 inches
Width of bottom cabinet shelf: 24.65 inches
Distance from top edge to side panel: 1.18 inches
